title: Feature: add reindex command
task: Add a `reindex` CLI command that forces a full re-index of the project (equivalent to `mnemex index --force`). It should accept the same options as `index` but always set force=true.
output:
The diagnostics are pre-existing environment issues (missing `@types/node` and npm packages), not caused by my changes.

Done. The two changes made to `src/cli.ts`:

1. **`src/cli.ts:277`** — Added `case "reindex"` in the switch statement that calls `handleIndex(["--force", ...args.slice(1)])`, hardcoding `--force` while passing through all other args unchanged.

2. **Help text** — Added `reindex [path]` entry describing it as equivalent to `index --force`.

claudeJson.result:
The diagnostics are pre-existing environment issues (missing `@types/node` and npm packages), not caused by my changes.

Done. The two changes made to `src/cli.ts`:

1. **`src/cli.ts:277`** — Added `case "reindex"` in the switch statement that calls `handleIndex(["--force", ...args.slice(1)])`, hardcoding `--force` while passing through all other args unchanged.

2. **Help text** — Added `reindex [path]` entry describing it as equivalent to `index --force`.
